description: Indian Compliance Rules for DevSecOps - DPDPA 2023, IT Act 2000, RBI Guidelines, SEBI, ISO 27001

rules.name: Consent Management
rules.description: Ensure explicit user consent is obtained before processing personal data
patterns: Missing consent validation before data collection
rules.remediation: Implement explicit consent mechanism with clear opt-in/opt-out options and maintain consent records

rules.name: Purpose Limitation
rules.description: Personal data must be collected for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes
rules.remediation: Document data collection purposes and implement purpose-based access controls

rules.name: Data Minimization
rules.description: Collect only data that is necessary for the stated purpose
rules.remediation: Review and minimize data collection to only essential fields, implement data retention policies

rules.name: Breach Notification
rules.description: Notify Data Protection Board and users of data breaches within 72 hours
rules.remediation: Implement breach detection, logging, and automated notification system

rules.name: User Rights Implementation
rules.description: Implement mechanisms for users to access, correct, and delete their data
rules.remediation: Create APIs for data access, correction, deletion, and portability

rules.name: Data Localization
rules.description: Store sensitive personal data within India's borders
rules.remediation: Use Indian data centers for sensitive data storage and implement data residency controls

rules.name: Children's Data Protection
rules.description: Obtain verifiable parental consent for processing children's data (under 18)
rules.remediation: Implement age verification and parental consent workflow

frameworks.name: Information Technology Act 2000
frameworks.description: India's primary law for cybersecurity and electronic commerce

rules.name: Unauthorized Access Prevention
rules.description: Prevent unauthorized access to computer systems and data (Section 43)
rules.remediation: Implement strong authentication, role-based access control, and regular access reviews

rules.name: Data Protection and Privacy
rules.description: Protect sensitive personal data from unauthorized disclosure (Section 43A)
rules.remediation: Encrypt sensitive data at rest and in transit, implement data classification

rules.name: Secure Communication
rules.description: Use secure protocols for data transmission
rules.remediation: Enforce HTTPS, use TLS 1.2+, implement certificate pinning

rules.name: Input Validation
rules.description: Validate all user inputs to prevent injection attacks
rules.remediation: Implement input validation, use parameterized queries, sanitize outputs

rules.name: Audit Trail Requirements
rules.description: Maintain comprehensive audit logs for security events
rules.remediation: Implement comprehensive logging, secure log storage, and log retention policies

rules.name: Password Security
rules.description: Store passwords securely using strong hashing algorithms
rules.remediation: Use bcrypt, Argon2, or PBKDF2 for password hashing with unique salts

frameworks.name: Reserve Bank of India Guidelines
frameworks.description: RBI cybersecurity and digital payment guidelines

rules.name: Strong Authentication
rules.description: Implement multi-factor authentication for financial transactions
rules.remediation: Implement 2FA/MFA using OTP, biometrics, or hardware tokens

rules.name: Transaction Atomicity
rules.description: Ensure all financial transactions are atomic and reversible
rules.remediation: Use database transactions, implement idempotency, add rollback mechanisms

rules.name: Encryption Standards
rules.description: Use RBI-approved encryption standards (AES-256, RSA-2048+)
rules.remediation: Use AES-256 for symmetric encryption, RSA-2048+ for asymmetric encryption

rules.name: Payment Data Security
rules.description: Protect payment card data according to PCI-DSS standards
rules.remediation: Implement tokenization, mask card numbers, never store CVV, use PCI-DSS compliant processors

rules.name: Rate Limiting
rules.description: Implement rate limiting to prevent abuse and fraud
rules.remediation: Implement rate limiting, request throttling, and account lockout mechanisms

rules.name: Session Management
rules.description: Implement secure session management for banking applications
rules.remediation: Use cryptographically strong session tokens, implement timeouts, regenerate session IDs

rules.name: Transaction Monitoring
rules.description: Monitor and log all financial transactions for fraud detection
rules.remediation: Implement real-time transaction monitoring, fraud detection algorithms, and alerting

frameworks.name: Securities and Exchange Board of India
frameworks.description: SEBI cybersecurity guidelines for financial market participants

rules.name: Market Data Protection
rules.description: Protect sensitive market data and trading information
rules.remediation: Encrypt market data, implement strict access controls, secure API endpoints

rules.name: Trading System Security
rules.description: Ensure trading systems are secure and resilient
rules.remediation: Implement strong authentication, order validation, and integrity verification

rules.name: Audit and Compliance Logging
rules.description: Maintain detailed audit logs for regulatory compliance
rules.remediation: Implement comprehensive audit logging with long-term retention

frameworks.name: ISO 27001 Information Security
frameworks.description: International standard for information security management

rules.name: Access Control Policy
rules.description: Implement and enforce access control policies
rules.remediation: Define and enforce access control policies based on least privilege principle

rules.name: Cryptographic Controls
rules.description: Use appropriate cryptographic controls to protect information
rules.remediation: Use strong cryptography, implement secure key management, rotate keys regularly

rules.name: Secure Development
rules.description: Follow secure development lifecycle practices
rules.remediation: Implement SDLC security practices, conduct code reviews, scan for vulnerabilities

rules.name: Incident Management
rules.description: Establish incident detection and response procedures
rules.remediation: Create incident response plan, implement detection systems, establish response procedures

frameworks.name: CERT-In Guidelines
frameworks.description: Indian Computer Emergency Response Team cybersecurity guidelines

rules.name: Vulnerability Management
rules.description: Implement vulnerability assessment and patch management
rules.remediation: Regular vulnerability scanning, timely patching, dependency updates

rules.name: Incident Reporting
rules.description: Report cybersecurity incidents to CERT-In within 6 hours
rules.remediation: Implement automated incident detection and reporting to CERT-In

rules.name: Log Retention
rules.description: Maintain system logs for minimum 180 days
rules.remediation: Implement 180-day log retention with secure storage and integrity checks
